name: Era Table Lamp - 25 Inch Height - TBL4583 - Creme - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Era 25 inch cream resin table lamp. This lamp gracefully combines form and function with its elegant resin body and classic fabric shade. The creme color adds a touch of warmth, complementing any decor style from modern to traditional. Standing tall at 25 inches, this lamp is perfect for side tables, desks, or bedside stands, providing just the right amount of ambient light. Its sleek design makes it a versatile piece that enhances both comfort and style in any room. Elevate your home's atmosphere with the sophisticated simplicity of the Era table lamp. Brighten moments and create a welcoming environment with this elegantly crafted piece.
